form.formComment: Drawn inside box. Latest effort finished 6th over 320m at this track beaten 14 lengths (19.45) behind Cawbourne Maxx in a Grade 5 on March 13. Solid showing expected.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on March 27 over 320m at this track behind Lagoon Ohiyesa beaten 9 lengths (19.12) in a Grade 5. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 320m at this track. Others better.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Temora (20.13) in a Grade 5, finishing a 15 length eighth. Yet to win but has placed six times from this draw. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Poor last start but ran a better race two back when fourth over 330m at Temora. Can't recommend in this field.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 10 lengths behind Sage Davies over 400m. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

form.formComment: Should get a clear run from the wide draw. Wasn't impressive last start but does have a great record at this track and distance, on best form is more than capable. Keep safe.
